pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines and downloads to this explicit path.
setup_task.sh downloads from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif and the TIF metadata contains LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR.
Python rasterio.open('/tmp/landsat.tif').count confirms there are exactly 4 bands.
The task explicitly mandates generating 4 virtual derived bands on top of the 4 original ones (4+4=8).
The task instructions mandate computing at least THREE vegetation/moisture spectral indices and ONE conditional classification band.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat 7 satellite imagery (2127x1564 pixels) downloaded directly from the opengeos/data GitHub repository to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The source TIF file contains exactly 4 original spectral bands. The task requires the agent to generate a total of 4 derived virtual bands (3 spectral indices and 1 conditional classification band), bringing the expected total number of bands in the output BEAM-DIMAP and GeoTIFF files to 8.
